## Description

Closes #___

[Describe the changes, including motivation and impact]

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, deps, tooling
- [ ] `breaking` — Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to change)

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (`npm run test:unit`)
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (`npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Manually tested (provide screenshots below if applicable)
- [ ] PWA offline behavior verified (if service worker / caching changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) — use `npm run commit` for help
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run format` pass
- [ ] No secrets or credentials introduced (gitleaks runs in pre-commit)
- [ ] Self-review performed
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
